text:
Once upon a time in a world barely changed by magic, there lived an elf named Eremiel. Eremiel was a curious sprite, always seeking answers to life’s obscure questions. The elves of their forest had myths that described the world as eternal—no changes were noted, after all. But Eremiel knew that wasn’t true.

One twilight, after trampolining around the halls of Silverwind Library, Eremiel stumbled across an ancient tome. Its cover whispered ancient secrets, and the very leaves seemed to listen with knowing smiles. Upon flipping the first page, Eremiel discovered secrets of the cosmos that no elf had known before.

Eremiel realized the book was a chronicle of cosmic events, rare artifacts lost to time, and secrets untold by even the mightiest elven poets. It spoke of planets eclipsing stars, of moons that shifted, and of stars born from the void—a cosmic event so rare that it happened only once every million years.
